branchNameLinter.msgBranchBanned: Branches with the name "%s" are not allowed.
branchNameLinter.msgPrefixNotAllowed: Branch prefix "%s" is not allowed. Use one of: chore, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, style, test
branchNameLinter.msgSeparatorRequired: Branch "%s" must contain a separator "%s". Format: {type}/{topic}
